mapper.select: SELECT no_product, nm_product, nm_detail_explain, nb_file, dt_start_date, dt_end_date, qt_sale_price, qt_stock FROM tb_product
SELECT no_product, nm_product, nm_detail_explain, nb_file, dt_start_date, dt_end_date, qt_sale_price, qt_stock FROM tb_product WHERE no_product=#{id}

SELECT p.no_product, p.nm_product, p.nm_detail_explain, p.nb_file, p.dt_start_date, p.dt_end_date, p.qt_sale_price, p.qt_stock, cp.nb_category, c.nm_category FROM tb_product p JOIN tb_category_product_mapping cp ON p.no_product = cp.no_product JOIN tb_category c ON c.nb_category = cp.nb_category WHERE c.nb_category=#{id}
